items.label: Documents & Manuals
items.how_to: Verify MEL, flight plan, NOTAMs, and aircraft technical log.

items.label: Circuit Breakers
items.how_to: All circuit breakers checked in and no tripped breakers.

items.label: Oxygen
items.how_to: Check crew oxygen pressure and test masks.

items.label: Battery Switch
items.how_to: Battery switch to ON position on overhead panel.

items.label: External Power
items.how_to: Verify external power connected and available.

items.label: Fuel Quantity
items.how_to: Verify fuel quantity matches fuel order and flight plan requirements.

items.label: IRS
items.how_to: Set all three IRS selectors to NAV. Alignment takes ~10 minutes.

items.label: Emergency Lights
items.how_to: Emergency exit lights switch to ARMED.

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Verify parking brake is set.

items.label: Fuel Control Switches
items.how_to: All four fuel control switches to CUTOFF.

items.label: Beacon
items.how_to: Anti-collision beacon light ON before engine start.

items.label: Hydraulic Demand Pumps
items.how_to: All hydraulic demand pump switches to AUTO.

items.label: Doors
items.how_to: Verify all doors closed on EICAS door display.

items.label: Pushback Clearance
items.how_to: Request and receive pushback clearance from ground.

items.label: Start Engine 4
items.how_to: Move engine 4 start switch to START. Monitor N2, EGT, and fuel flow.

items.label: Start Engine 3
items.how_to: Move engine 3 start switch to START.

items.label: Start Engine 2
items.how_to: Move engine 2 start switch to START.

items.label: Start Engine 1
items.how_to: Move engine 1 start switch to START.

items.label: Engine Parameters
items.how_to: Verify all engines stable: N1, N2, EGT, fuel flow, oil pressure normal.

items.label: Generators
items.how_to: All four generator switches ON, verify on bus.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Set flaps to takeoff position (10 or 20 per performance calculation).

items.label: Stabilizer Trim
items.how_to: Set stabilizer trim to computed takeoff trim.

items.label: Flight Controls
items.how_to: Full deflection check of ailerons, elevator, and rudder.

items.label: Nosewheel Steering
items.how_to: Nosewheel steering switch to ON.

items.label: Taxi Clearance
items.how_to: Request and receive taxi clearance from ground.

items.label: Transponder
items.how_to: Set transponder to TA/RA and verify correct squawk code.

items.label: Takeoff Briefing
items.how_to: Review takeoff speeds (V1, VR, V2), departure procedure, and emergency actions.

items.label: Autobrake
items.how_to: Autobrake selector to RTO.

items.label: Strobe Lights
items.how_to: Strobe lights ON.

items.label: Landing Lights
items.how_to: All landing lights ON.

items.label: TCAS
items.how_to: Verify TCAS in TA/RA mode.

items.label: Air Conditioning Packs
items.how_to: Packs OFF for maximum takeoff performance or ON if runway length permits.

items.label: Thrust Levers
items.how_to: Advance thrust levers to TOGA or FLX detent.

items.label: V1
items.how_to: PNF calls V1 — commit to takeoff.

items.label: Rotate
items.how_to: At VR, smoothly rotate to 10° pitch up.

items.label: Positive Rate
items.how_to: On positive rate of climb, call 'Gear Up'.

items.label: Gear
items.how_to: Verify gear up and locked.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Retract flaps on schedule.

items.label: Packs
items.how_to: If packs were OFF for takeoff, turn ON.

items.label: Altimeter
items.how_to: Set altimeter to transition altitude/level as required.

items.label: Cruise Altitude
items.how_to: Verify at planned cruise altitude.

items.label: Fuel Balance
items.how_to: Monitor fuel balance between tanks.

items.label: Systems
items.how_to: Periodic scan of EICAS for any warnings.

items.label: Approach Briefing
items.how_to: Brief approach, missed approach, landing runway, weather, and NOTAMs.

items.label: Altimeters
items.how_to: Set QNH when below transition level.

items.label: Landing Data
items.how_to: Enter VREF and landing flap setting in FMC.

items.label: Autobrake
items.how_to: Set autobrake to desired setting (2, 3, or MAX).

items.label: Speedbrake
items.how_to: Speedbrake lever to ARMED.

items.label: Gear
items.how_to: Landing gear DOWN, three green.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Set flaps to landing position (25 or 30).

items.label: Landing Lights
items.how_to: All landing lights ON.

items.label: Touchdown
items.how_to: Flare and touchdown.

items.label: Thrust Reversers
items.how_to: Deploy thrust reversers after main gear touchdown.

items.label: Spoilers
items.how_to: Verify speedbrakes deployed.

items.label: Reverse Thrust
items.how_to: Cancel reverse thrust at 60 knots.

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Set parking brake.

items.label: Fuel Control
items.how_to: All four fuel control switches to CUTOFF.

items.label: Beacon
items.how_to: Anti-collision beacon OFF.

items.label: Seatbelt Sign
items.how_to: Turn off seatbelt sign.

items.label: APU
items.how_to: Start APU if needed for ground power.

items.label: External Power
items.how_to: Connect external power when available.
